zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Webbe於1543年出生在英國素福爾可巴頓 米爾斯時，她的父親John Clark Webbe37歲，母親Agnes Smythe37歲。她於1573年與Barnabie Powell在英國維爾爾米爾登哈爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年9月在她的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可巴頓 米爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Webbe于1543年出生在英国素福爾可巴頓 米爾斯时，她的父亲John Clark Webbe37岁，母亲Agnes Smythe37岁。她于1573年与Barnabie Powell在英国維爾爾米爾登哈爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1594年9月在她的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可巴頓 米爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Webbe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Webbe was born in 1543, in Barton Mills, Suffolk, England, her father, John Clark Webbe, was 37 and her mother, Agnes Smythe, was 37. She married Barnabie Powell in 1573, in Mildenhall, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in September 1594, in her hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Barton Mills, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Webbe est née en 1543, à Barton Mills, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Clark Webbe, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Smythe, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Barnabie Powell en 1573, à Mildenhall, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1594, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Barton Mills, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Webbe 1543 in Barton Mills, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Clark Webbe 37 und ihre Mutter Agnes Smythe 37. Sie hat 1573 in Mildenhall, Wiltshire, England Barnabie Powell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1594 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Barton Mills, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Webbe è nata il nel 1543 nel Barton Mills, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Clark Webbe, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Agnes Smythe, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Barnabie Powell nel 1573, nel Mildenhall, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1594, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Barton Mills, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Webbeが1543年にイギリススフォルクバートン ミルズで生まれた時，父John Clark Webbeは37歳，母Agnes Smytheは37歳であった。1573年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアミルデンハルでBarnabie Powellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1594年9月に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクバートン ミルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Webbe(이)가 1543년 영국 수폴크 바턴 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Clark Webbe(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Smythe(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1573년 영국 윌츠히르 미데홀에서 Barnabie Powell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 9월 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 바턴 미스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Webbe родилась в 1543 г. в местности бартон миллс, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Clark Webbe было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Smythe, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Barnabie Powell в 1573 г. в местности маилденолл, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла сентябрь 1594 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности бартон миллс, суффолк, Англия.
